mapper.sql: id, application_id, credit_score, total_liability, overdue_count, credit_card_utilization, loan_account_count, external_report_no, assessment_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_assessment (application_id, credit_score, total_liability, overdue_count, credit_card_utilization, loan_account_count, external_report_no, assessment_time, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{creditScore}, #{totalLiability}, #{overdueCount}, #{creditCardUtilization}, #{loanAccountCount}, #{externalReportNo}, #{assessmentTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE credit_assessment SET credit_score=#{creditScore}, total_liability=#{totalLiability}, overdue_count=#{overdueCount}, credit_card_utilization=#{creditCardUtilization}, loan_account_count=#{loanAccountCount}, external_report_no=#{externalReportNo}, assessment_time=#{assessmentTime}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE application_id=#{applicationId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM credit_assessment WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
